title: KAPP-Sen TMC: Fixation of Cells and Nuclei for Chromium Fixed RNA Profiling
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dgr4u","text":"Cells are fixated prior to scRNA-seq according to 10X Genomics protocol CG000478.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cednl","text":"\n\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Centrifuge sample at 350 rcf for 5 min at 4°C.
Remove the supernatant without disturbing the pellet.
Add 1 ml Fixation Buffer to the sample pellet and pipette mix 5x.
Incubate for 1 h at room temperature (20°C) or for 16-24 h at 4°C for long term storage.
Centrifuge at 850 rcf for 5 min at room temperature.
Remove the supernatant without disturbing the pellet.
Add 1 ml chilled Quenching Buffer to the sample pellet and pipette mix 5x and keep on ice.
Determine cell concentration of the fixed sample using AO/PI (acridine orange/propidium iodide) Cell Viability Kit for Luna-FL automated cell counter.
Thaw Enhancer ( 10x Genomics PN-2000482 ) for 10 min at 65°C. Vortex and centrifuge briefly. Keep warm and verify no precipitate before use.
Add 1 volume pre-warmed Enhancer to fixed sample in Quenching Buffer. Pipette mix.
Store sample at 4°C for up to 1 week.
For long term storage (up to 6 months) also add 50% glycerol for a final concentration of 10% with Quenching buffer and store at -80°C.
creator: Sergii Domanskyi
